title: Time, the Comedian
writer: Fanny Hatton, Frederic Hatton, Kate Jordan
actors: Mae Busch, Lew Cody, Gertrude Olmstead
plot: Nora Dakon, bored with the dullness of her life in a small New Jersey town, leaves her husband and small daughter to run off with Larry Brundage, a wealthy New York City sportsman. Nora's husband kills himself, and, to avoid scand...
